mapper.select:
select dor.nx_department_orders_id as orderId, ds.nx_department_id as departmentId, ds.nx_department_name as departmentName, ds.nx_department_lat as lat, ds.nx_department_lng as lng, ds.nx_department_address as address, dor.nx_DO_goods_name as goodsName, dor.nx_DO_quantity as quantity, dor.nx_DO_standard as standard, dor.nx_DO_remark as remark, dor.nx_DO_arrive_date as arriveDate, dor.nx_DO_arrive_only_date as arriveOnlyDate, dor.nx_DO_apply_date as applyDate from nx_department_orders dor join nx_department ds on ds.nx_department_id = dor.nx_DO_department_father_id where dor.nx_DO_distributer_id = #{disId} and ds.nx_department_dis_id = #{disId} and dor.nx_DO_collaborative_nx_dis_id = -1 and dor.nx_DO_status < 3 and dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id = -1 and dor.nx_DO_nx_comm_restraunt_id = -1
and ( dor.nx_DO_arrive_date = #{routeDate} or dor.nx_DO_arrive_only_date = #{routeDateOnly} )
order by ds.nx_department_pinyin, dor.nx_department_orders_id
mapper.update: update nx_dis_route_plan set nx_drp_planned_start_at = #{nxDrpPlannedStartAt}, nx_drp_planned_end_at = #{nxDrpPlannedEndAt}, nx_drp_total_wait_minutes = #{nxDrpTotalWaitMinutes}, nx_drp_total_late_minutes = #{nxDrpTotalLateMinutes}, nx_drp_schedule_status = #{nxDrpScheduleStatus} where nx_drp_id = #{nxDrpId}
